content: Remote OK Crypto Trader Maidel Group <p>MAIDEL LIMITED is an international company operating at the intersection of digital assets, market intelligence, and data-driven trading strategies. Our focus is on building a strong team of professionals who want to gain real-world experience in financial markets and develop practical trading expertise.</p><p>We are currently opening a Crypto Trader position for individuals who are starting their professional path and are interested in market analysis, trading and data-driven decision making.</p><p>This role combines independent trading activity with structured guidance and mentorship from experienced market specialists. We don't have strict KPI requirements, and our work is aimed at training and improving trading skills in the real cryptocurrency market. No prior professional background is required â full training is provided.</p><p><strong>Key Responsibilities</strong><br /></p><ul><li>Execute trades across digital asset markets following established strategies and risk guidelines.</li><li>Monitor market movements, liquidity flows, and price dynamics in real time.</li><li>Analyze charts, indicators, and trading signals to support decision-making.</li><li>Manage open positions and evaluate potential risks.</li><li>Stay informed on crypto-related news and assess its market impact.</li><li>Work with professional trading platforms and analytical tools.</li><li>Track and evaluate personal trading performance.</li><li>Continuously develop market understanding and trading skills.<br /><strong><br /></strong></li></ul><p><strong>What We Offer</strong></p><ul><li>Opportunity to join a growing international company.</li><li>Fully remote format â work from anywhere.</li><li>Flexible schedule and workload.</li><li>Work with professional trading platforms and real market data.</li><li>Use of advanced analytical tools and systems.</li><li>Clear development path with increasing responsibilities.</li><li>Ongoing support from experienced market professionals.</li><li>Practical training in working with professional trading platforms under the guidance of experienced specialists.<strong><br /></strong></li></ul><p><strong>Interview Process</strong></p><ul><li>Initial phone conversation with a company recruitment coordinator.</li><li>Detailed interview with HR.</li><li>Practical training session with one of our trading specialists.</li></ul> other, analyst, mobile 2026-05-11T19:00:52+00:00 1131541 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-crypto-trader-maidel-group-1131541 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Tooling Engineer Unikraft Remote - â¬3,000.00 per month</p><p class="css-1655dm5 e1wnkr790">Job description:</p><div class="css-1dhd1xm eu4oa1w0"><div class="jd-appended-job-description"><div class="jd-section-employer"><div class="jd-description-text"><p>You're right, I sanded it down too much. The whole point of the role is the creative-to-audience-to-data loop, and I cut that out. Here's a version that keeps the depth, still passes Indeed:</p><p><strong>Meta Ads Manager + Creative Producer (Remote, AI-Native)</strong></p><p>We are hiring one person to own Meta advertising end-to-end for a portfolio of AI-powered SaaS products sold to small businesses in Europe and other regions. This role combines audience strategy, creative production, and performance analysis. It is not a media-buying role and it is not a creative role. It is both.</p><p><strong>About the role</strong></p><p>You will be responsible for understanding each target audience deeply enough to design creative that speaks to them, producing that creative yourself using modern AI tools, launching campaigns across multiple countries and languages, and reading Meta's data closely enough to know which variant is working, why, and what to do next. You will work directly with the founder with no layers in between.</p><p><strong>Responsibilities</strong></p><ul><li>Research and define target audiences for each product and each market, including their pain points, language, objections, and the visual codes they respond to</li><li>Translate that audience understanding into creative concepts and hooks that fit each segment</li><li>Produce video and static ad creative end-to-end using AI tools such as Midjourney, Runway, Seedance, ElevenLabs, and similar</li><li>Build and launch 5 or more creative variants per campaign cycle, structured for clean testing</li><li>Read Meta Ads Manager data in depth: hook rate, thumb-stop rate, CTR, CPM, frequency, audience overlap, attribution windows, and post-purchase signals</li><li>Diagnose what is actually driving performance, not just which ad has the lowest CPA on the surface</li><li>Pause losing variants quickly, scale winners, and rebuild the testing queue weekly</li><li>Localise creative and messaging for non-English markets where you may not have lived</li><li>Integrate Meta with internal analytics, CRM, and backend systems; technical curiosity required</li><li>Report results weekly with a clear narrative, not just a dashboard screenshot</li></ul><p><strong>Requirements</strong></p><ul><li>Demonstrable experience managing Meta ad budgets of â¬10,000 per month or more</li><li>A portfolio of ads you have personally created and personally run, with the performance data behind them</li><li>Strong creative judgment, especially for the first 2 seconds of short-form video</li><li>Daily working knowledge of AI creative tools as part of a real production workflow</li><li>Deep familiarity with Meta Ads Manager analytics beyond surface-level metrics</li><li>Ability to work independently and move fast without hand-holding</li><li>Comfort with technical setup such as Conversions API, pixel events, CRM integrations, and basic API work</li><li>Fluent written English</li></ul></div></div><div class="jd-section-job-type"><p class="jd-description-text">Job Type: Full-time</p></div></div></div></div> marketing, ads, ai 2026-05-11T08:41:10+00:00 1131538 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-meta-ads-manager-creative-producer-ai-native-singularads-com-1131538 https://re
